title: Insurance Fraud Reporting - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SAIF CORPORATION PREVENTING FRAUD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way to report workers' compensation fraud, doctors who bill for phantom services, and workers receiving benefits dishonestly. 400 High Street SE Salem, OR 97312 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 282-8822 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES MEDICARE.GOV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides information on all aspects of Medicare, including how to apply, find and compare healthcare providers, make address changes and resolve Medicare card issues, get help with costs, find out how Medicare works with other insurance, and report Medicare fraud. The website also provides information on nursing homes, hospitals, home health services, and medical equipment suppliers. Phone line assists with Medicare billing questions and questions about claims, records, and expenses. 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 633-4227 - 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAIF CORPORATION PREVENTING FRAUD
